what: Neural pipeline (tagging only) on the DBBE Byzantine book-epigram gold standard: unedited medieval scribal Greek verse, 7th-15th c.
protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_dbbe(); CPU sequential; parse=False (the gold carries no trees); fold dbbe-lingann-fold-v1 (sha d9953f73...); leakage 0; caveats: DBBE tagset mapped to UPOS, gold lemmas are normalized Attic headwords over non-normalized surfaces, copular forms capped by the no-tree mapping
